panel_grid.description: Parametric flat panel grid — count_x × count_y panels of given width/height with optional gap.
panel_grid.use_case: Facade or floor paneling. Bake to a 'Panels' layer for downstream rationalisation.

morph_to_surface.description: Morph a base geometry across a target surface in a U×V grid.
morph_to_surface.use_case: Wrap a repeating module onto a freeform facade or roof.

offset_facade.description: Offset a set of base curves to a depth, creating layered facade strips.
offset_facade.use_case: Expressive facade banding with controlled depth and seam count.

field_scatter.description: Scatter points inside a boundary, biased toward an attractor.
field_scatter.use_case: Site furniture, tree planting, urban scatter prototypes.
